faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to cockroach problems in Malverne?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Malverne residents in most cases. Cockroach infestations require prompt attention, and our team prioritizes emergency calls to prevent the problem from spreading throughout your home or business.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 cockroach treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection, targeted pesticide application using safe EPA-approved products, crack and crevice treatment, baiting systems, and a follow-up visit. The exact price depends on the size of your property and severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for families and pets in Malverne homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use family-safe and pet-friendly products that are highly effective against cockroaches while minimizing risk to your loved ones. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your cockroach extermination services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive satisfaction guarantee. If cockroaches return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also provide prevention tips to help keep your Malverne home roach-free long-term.
